name: PlainClaw
description: Makes OpenClaw reply in short, plain language. Removes jargon, consultant phrasing, unexplained acronyms, and workplace buzzwords while keeping the user's language and tone.

mode.label: Rewrite mode
mode.help: Adaptive only rewrites jargon-heavy replies. Always rewrites every normal reply.

toneMatch.label: Match user tone
toneMatch.help: Keep the user's language and rough tone instead of sounding generic.

jargonSensitivity.label: Jargon sensitivity
jargonSensitivity.help: How aggressively PlainClaw treats technical jargon and workplace buzzwords as rewrite targets.

shortenOutput.label: Shorten output
shortenOutput.help: Remove filler, throat-clearing, and repeated caveats.

trackStats.label: Track local stats
trackStats.help: Keep local rewrite counters in memory for /plainclaw status. No chat content is uploaded anywhere.
